title: Pushing My AI Dark Factory to Its Limits with Opus + Kimi Combined
summary: Archon is an open-source AI coding harness and workflow builder that enables self-building codebases through custom agent workflows. It supports model composition strategies that route different reasoning tasks to different models based on computational requirements.
